summary: Tested urgent UI/UX fixes for Raw Surf OS. Backend DELETE endpoints verified working. Frontend FAB button is visible for photographers but map tiles don't render (black screen). Camera modal has missing Upload icon import (FIXED). Settings page has photographer tools section working. Gallery page has 405 error when fetching gallery items - missing GET endpoint.

minor.issue: Missing endpoint - returns 405 Method Not Allowed. Frontend tries to fetch items when clicking gallery.

ui_bugs.issue: Map tiles don't render - shows black screen. Leaflet library loads but tiles from CartoDB don't appear.
Duplicate FAB buttons in code - both start-live-fab and go-live-fab with same functionality at lines 744-758 and 872-883
Duplicate 'Currently Shooting Indicator' code at lines 760-780 and 885-905

integration_issues.issue: Clicking session gallery fails with 405 - GET /api/galleries/{gallery_id}/items doesn't exist

action_items: Fix map tile loading - CartoDB tiles not appearing despite Leaflet loading
Remove duplicate FAB button code in MapPage.js (lines 872-905 duplicate lines 744-780)
critical_code_review_comments: MapPage.js has Upload icon used but not imported - FIXED in this session
MapPage.js line 1210 uses Upload component which was missing from lucide-react import
Duplicate code in MapPage.js: Two FAB buttons and two 'Currently Shooting' indicators
Map re-initializes on every filter change which could cause performance issues

success_rate.backend: 90% (9/10 tests passed - gallery items GET endpoint missing)
success_rate.frontend: 70% (FAB visible, Settings working, Gallery partial, Map tiles not loading)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Map page has tile loading issues - black screen despite Leaflet being loaded. FAB button IS visible at bottom-right when logged in as photographer. Gallery DELETE endpoints work at backend level. Missing GET /api/galleries/{gallery_id}/items endpoint causes 405 when clicking session galleries. Settings page Photographer Tools section works correctly. Upload icon import was missing in MapPage.js - FIXED.

features_tested.map_fab_button: VISIBLE - FAB button shows at bottom right with 'Go Live' label for photographers
features_tested.map_filters: BUTTONS VISIBLE - All, Surf Spots, Photographers filter buttons present
features_tested.map_tiles: NOT WORKING - Map shows black screen despite Leaflet loading
features_tested.camera_modal_toggle: CODE PRESENT but Upload icon was missing import - FIXED
features_tested.gallery_delete_api: WORKING - DELETE /api/galleries/{gallery_id} and DELETE /api/galleries/{gallery_id}/items/{item_id} return proper responses
features_tested.settings_photographer_tools: WORKING - All 4 menu items visible: Live Sessions, My Gallery, Bookings, Earnings

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Missing Upload icon import from lucide-react
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added Upload to lucide-react import line
